Moin moin 

desktop@ would like to ask for an exp-run for poppler 0.90.1 -- it should be a very smooth one (bug fix release).

Patch is attached, and can also be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/poppler-0.90.1.v1.diff

mfg Tobias
